rationale: Both evaluations give the identical score (4/10) and reach the same core conclusion: the candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design. The variant simply expands its lists with more specific examples (naming actual languages/frameworks and adding SIMD/MIMD/GPU specifics), but these are reworded elaborations of the same skills and gaps already present in the resume, not penalties tied to the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change. No reasoning keys off the candidate's country, nationality, or address.
